title: CBDT Issues New Forms for PAN Data Changes and Corrections
content:
# CBDT Issues New Forms for PAN Data Changes and Corrections

Ek important update hai! Government ne PAN data mein changes ya corrections ke liye naye forms specify kiye hain. Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) ne iske liye ek order announce kiya hai.

*   **Order Details:** Yeh update **Order F. No. ADG(S)-1/PAN/M/3699/2026 dated April 01, 2026**, ke through publish kiya gaya hai.
*   **New Forms:**
    *   **PAN CR-01:** This form is prescribed for individuals seeking changes or corrections in their PAN data.
    *   **PAN CR-02:** This form is for non-individuals (like companies, firms, etc.) for changes or corrections in their PAN data.
*   **Effective Date:** Yeh naye forms aur procedures **April 1, 2026** se effective ho gaye hain.
*   **Purpose:** The main aim is to streamline and standardize the process of updating or correcting PAN details, ensuring better accuracy and compliance.
*   **Submission Process:** Applicants can submit these forms physically at PAN service centers managed by UTIITSL or Protean e-Gov, ya phir unki official websites ke through online bhi submit kar sakte hain.
*   **Key Features:** Ab Aadhaar number furnish karna zaroori ho gaya hai for most applicants. Non-residents ke liye citizenship details aur passport details dena mandatory hai. Email ID aur mobile number dena bhi ab mandatory kar diya gaya hai.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in)

*Published on: 3 April 2026*
